events.name: TILE_CLICK
events.description: Emitted on tile click with grid coordinates

events.name: UNIT_CLICK
events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click

events.name: END_TURN
events.description: Emits UI:{endTurnEvent} with {} on end turn

events.name: PLAY_AGAIN
events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

overridableConfigKeys.label: Features
overridableConfigKeys.description: Decorative town features: fountain, tower, siege engines, windmill, cart.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tiles
overridableConfigKeys.description: 6x6 town-square grid — wall-block border, alternating stone-floor and cobbled-road interior.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Units
overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial unit roster (Soldier + Guard defenders vs Goblin + Troll raiders) — takes priority over entity-derived units.
